## How to verify

## Checklist

- [ ] One change, one pull request
- [ ] CI is green (security, Vale, readability, accessibility if enabled)
- [ ] If this changes user-facing copy, it is at Grade 8 or below
- [ ] If this changes UI, keyboard navigation still works and contrast is met
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or production data added
